summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KN3 ERP Discovery assessment module with 3-view structure (Dashboard, Domain filling, Summary). Backend APIs and frontend UI are working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 404 for client with no projects
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - client has no projects assigned
Expected behavior - PDF export requires submission first

minor_notes.issue: Template list shows 'Domains: 0, Questions: 0' but detail shows correct 14 domains
minor_notes.impact: Display inconsistency in list view only, detail view is correct

minor_notes.issue: Submit button disabled when no answers filled
minor_notes.impact: Expected behavior - button should be disabled until answers are provided

passed_tests: Backend health check
Public endpoints (services, cases, blog, tech, team)

Client login (client@kubus.id)
Admin dashboard stats
Admin users list
Assessment templates list - KN3 ERP Discovery template found with 14 domains, 82+ questions

Get session detail - shows proper 3-view structure
Client can see their assigned assessments

Assessment list displays KN3 ERP Discovery template correctly
Can open assessment and see Dashboard view
Dashboard shows 14 domain cards with ProgressRing indicators
Dashboard has 'Export PDF' and 'Lihat Ringkasan' buttons
Navigation tabs (Overview, Pengisian, Ringkasan) are present and functional
Clicking domain card navigates to Domain filling view
Domain view shows questions with proper form elements (radio buttons, inputs)
Domain view has prev/next domain navigation buttons
Summary view shows all domains with their questions
Summary view displays answer status for each question
Summary view has Export PDF button
Summary view has Submit Final button (correctly disabled when no answers)

features: ProgressRing on each card showing completion %
